== Notes for [[Item:Q2309|Q2309]] ==

{geni:about_me} AFTER BHIMA KILLED HIS FATHER, HE WAS INSTALLED AS THE NEW RULER OF MAGADHA. IN THE GREAT MAHABHARATA WAR HE FOUGHT ON THE PANDAVA SIDE. (2/24).

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D4CD3B41EFBBFC9A22EF79916BF66F


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
